title: Review Charger Status And Associated Robot In Charger Selection
summary: Use the Charger Selection view to identify a charger by charger ID, verify whether it is enabled or disabled, and see which robot is currently associated with that charger.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when support needs to inspect a charger in the Charger Selection view, confirm the charger's unique ID, verify whether the charger is enabled or disabled, and determine which robot is currently on or associated with that charger.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to disable or re-enable a charger; this source-specific procedure is limited to viewing and recording charger information.
Do not use this runbook for manual robot charging or charger recovery actions beyond status review.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Charger Selection view, select the charger by charger ID, review displayed charger status and associated robot information, and record observations for follow-up.

safety_notes: This procedure is limited to viewing and recording information shown in the Charger Selection screen.

The source notes that charger disablement affects whether RMS and WCS send AGVs to that charging location; do not change charger state as part of this procedure unless directed by a separate approved procedure.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Charger Selection screen
Visibility of charger IDs and charger status information

access_required: Access to the RMS or relevant interface where the Charger Selection screen is available
system_preconditions: The Charger Selection view is available and displays charger IDs
Charger detail information is visible after selecting a charger ID

visual_references.description: Charger Selection training frame showing charger ID selection, charger status visibility, and robot association details.

steps.title: Open the Charger Selection view
steps.purpose: Access the screen used to inspect charger-specific information.
steps.instruction: Open the Charger Selection view so charger IDs and charger details can be reviewed.
steps.expected_result: The Charger Selection view is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The Charger Selection screen is open and available for charger lookup.
steps.failure_condition: The Charger Selection view cannot be opened or is not available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Charger Selection screen referenced in the training material.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Charger Selection view does not show the charger information described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Each charging station has a unique ID; clicking the charger ID in Charger Selection shows charger status and what robot is on that charger.

steps.title: Identify the charger by charger ID
steps.purpose: Ensure the correct charging station is selected using its unique identifier.
steps.instruction: Identify the charging station by its unique charger ID in the Charger Selection view.
steps.expected_result: The target charger is located by its unique charger ID.
steps.healthy_condition: A unique charger ID is visible and can be used to distinguish the charging station.
steps.failure_condition: The charger ID is not visible, not unique, or the target charger cannot be identified.

actions.label: Locate charger ID
actions.exact_action: Identify the charging station by its unique charger ID.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Charger Selection screen area showing charger ID selection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the required charger ID cannot be identified in the Charger Selection view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Each charging station has a unique ID.

steps.title: Select the charger ID to view details
steps.purpose: Open the charger-specific detail display for status review.
steps.instruction: Click the charger ID to view charger details.
steps.expected_result: Charger details for the selected charger are displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: Selecting the charger ID opens the charger detail information.
steps.failure_condition: Clicking the charger ID does not display charger details.

actions.label: Select charger
actions.exact_action: Click the charger ID to view charger details.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charger ID selection area used to open charger details.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if selecting the charger ID does not show charger status or associated robot information.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Clicking the charger ID in Charger Selection shows charger status and what robot is on that charger.

steps.title: Review charger enabled or disabled status
steps.purpose: Confirm the current logical state of the selected charger.
steps.instruction: Check the displayed charger status and verify whether the charger is shown as enabled or disabled.
steps.expected_result: The charger status is confirmed as enabled or disabled.
steps.healthy_condition: The charger status field is visible and clearly indicates whether the charger is enabled or disabled.
steps.failure_condition: The charger status is missing, unclear, or does not match expected operational understanding.

actions.label: Inspect charger status
actions.exact_action: Check the displayed charger status and verify whether the charger is shown as enabled or disabled.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Charger Selection screen area showing enabled or disabled charger status.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Charger Selection view does not show charger status information described in the source.
Escalate if the observed charger state does not match the expected operational understanding and further action is needed beyond viewing status.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Selecting a charger displays charger status, whether it is enabled or disabled.
The slide and aligned transcript describe selecting a charger by unique charger ID, viewing charger status, checking whether the charger is enabled or disabled.

steps.title: Review the robot associated with the charger
steps.purpose: Determine which robot is currently on or associated with the selected charger.
steps.instruction: Check which robot is shown as being on or associated with that charger.
steps.expected_result: The currently associated robot is identified from the charger details.
steps.healthy_condition: The charger detail display shows which robot is on the charger.
steps.failure_condition: No associated robot information is shown, or the displayed information is unclear.

actions.label: Inspect associated robot
actions.exact_action: Check which robot is shown as being on or associated with that charger.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Charger Selection screen area showing the robot currently associated with the charger.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Charger Selection view does not show the associated robot information described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Clicking the charger ID in Charger Selection shows what robot is on that charger.

steps.title: Record charger observations for follow-up
steps.purpose: Preserve the observed charger information for support or operational follow-up.
steps.instruction: Record the observed charger ID, charger status, and associated robot for support or operational follow-up.
steps.expected_result: The charger ID, charger status, and associated robot are documented.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed charger details are captured accurately for later review or escalation.
steps.failure_condition: Observed details cannot be recorded completely because required information is missing from the screen.

actions.label: Document observations
actions.exact_action: Record the observed charger ID, charger status, and associated robot for support or operational follow-up.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if required charger details are not available to document.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The source describes using the Charger Selection screen to inspect charger status details, including whether the charger is enabled or disabled and which robot is on that charger.

success_criteria: The correct charger is identified by unique charger ID.
The selected charger's status is confirmed as enabled or disabled.
The robot currently on or associated with the charger is identified.
Observed charger details are recorded for support or operational follow-up.
healthy_conditions: The Charger Selection view opens successfully.
Each charging station is identifiable by a unique charger ID.
Selecting a charger ID displays charger details.
The charger detail display shows charger status and associated robot information.
failure_conditions: The Charger Selection view is unavailable or does not open.
The target charger cannot be identified by charger ID.
Selecting the charger ID does not display charger details.
Charger status or associated robot information is missing or unclear.
The observed charger state requires action beyond status review.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the Charger Selection view does not show the charger status or associated robot information described in the source.
Escalate if the observed charger state does not match the expected operational understanding and further action is needed beyond viewing status.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Charger Selection screen showing charger ID selection, charger status, and associated robot information.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Each charging station has a unique ID; clicking the charger ID in Charger Selection shows charger status and what robot is on that charger.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide exact navigation steps for reaching the Charger Selection view.
The source packet does not provide a formal recording location or template for documenting observations.
The source packet does not define expected charger state values beyond enabled or disabled.
The source packet does not specify follow-up actions after an unexpected charger state is observed.
